title: NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION - 211info
text: BASIN TRANSIT SERVICE VETERANS ON THE GO NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) services to VA facilities, non-VA health and behavioral health appointments, pharmacies, and other health-related services. 1130 Adams Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Veterans Hours: Varies by service (541) 883-2877 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 883-2877 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BASIN TRANSIT SERVICE VETERANS ON THE GO
